landscape_nodes.description: Whole-scan or submap retrieval using a compact place representation.
landscape_nodes.name: Global retrieval

landscape_nodes.description: Deterministic geometric, projection, histogram, or signal-processing descriptors.
landscape_nodes.name: Handcrafted descriptors

landscape_nodes.description: BEV, polar, range-view, contextual, or discretized handcrafted representations.
landscape_nodes.name: Projection / context

landscape_nodes.description: Fourier, Radon, sinogram, and related transform-domain methods.
landscape_nodes.name: Frequency / transform

landscape_nodes.description: Explicit points, triangles, contours, graphs, or other geometric structures.
landscape_nodes.name: Geometry / topology

landscape_nodes.description: Data-driven global embeddings and similarity functions.
landscape_nodes.name: Learned descriptors

landscape_nodes.description: Learned BEV, range, spherical, or other projected representations.
landscape_nodes.name: Projection-based learning

landscape_nodes.description: Encoders operating primarily on raw points or point neighborhoods.
landscape_nodes.name: Point-based learning

landscape_nodes.description: Voxel, sparse-convolution, and discretized 3D encoders.
landscape_nodes.name: Voxel / sparse learning

landscape_nodes.description: Place representations learned across LiDAR and another sensor or map source.
landscape_nodes.name: Multimodal learning

landscape_nodes.description: Learned global retrieval that does not yet fit a stable representation branch.
landscape_nodes.name: Other learned retrieval

landscape_nodes.description: Recognition based on local features, segments, objects, semantics, or relations.
landscape_nodes.name: Local, segment and semantic structure

landscape_nodes.description: Keypoint, patch, or neighborhood descriptors and matching.
landscape_nodes.name: Local descriptors

landscape_nodes.description: Recognition through segment or object descriptors and associations.
landscape_nodes.name: Segment / object matching

landscape_nodes.description: Graph-based recognition using semantic entities and relations.
landscape_nodes.name: Semantic graphs

landscape_nodes.description: Semantic representations without an explicit relational graph.
landscape_nodes.name: Semantic descriptors

landscape_nodes.description: Recognition using sequences, submaps, trajectories, or persistent maps.
landscape_nodes.name: Temporal and map-assisted

landscape_nodes.description: Ordered scan sequences and learned or handcrafted temporal context.
landscape_nodes.name: Sequence-based recognition

landscape_nodes.description: Explicit scan-to-map, submap, or persistent-map recognition.
landscape_nodes.name: Map / submap-assisted

landscape_nodes.description: Cross-source, lifelong, uncertainty-aware, and other emerging LPR directions.
landscape_nodes.name: Emerging and cross-domain

landscape_nodes.description: Recognition across sensing sources, platforms, viewpoints, or map domains.
landscape_nodes.name: Cross-source / cross-view

landscape_nodes.description: Continual adaptation, novelty, memory, or calibrated uncertainty.
landscape_nodes.name: Lifelong / uncertainty

landscape_nodes.description: Emerging primary contributions awaiting a stable landscape branch.
landscape_nodes.name: Other emerging methods

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods that encode a complete scan or submap into a descriptor used for candidate place retrieval.
exclude: methods used only for local registration after retrieval
taxonomy_nodes.name: Global Descriptor

taxonomy_nodes.description: Global descriptors constructed by deterministic geometric, projection, histogram, or signal-processing rules.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Handcrafted

taxonomy_nodes.description: Handcrafted global descriptors derived from bird's-eye-view or polar BEV representations.
taxonomy_nodes.name: BEV

taxonomy_nodes.description: Handcrafted descriptors based on spatial bins, histograms, signatures, or discrete scan partitions.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Discretization

taxonomy_nodes.description: Handcrafted descriptors using Fourier, Radon, sinogram, or related transform-domain representations.
exclude: ordinary spatial histogram without transform-domain matching
taxonomy_nodes.name: Frequency / Transform Domain

taxonomy_nodes.description: Handcrafted global descriptors built from point sets, stable primitives, graphs, contours, triangles, or other explicit structures.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Point / Structural

taxonomy_nodes.description: Global scan or submap descriptors learned from data for retrieval or loop-closure classification.
exclude: handcrafted descriptor followed only by a learned threshold
taxonomy_nodes.name: Learning

taxonomy_nodes.description: Learned global descriptors based primarily on voxels, sparse convolutions, or other 3D discretizations.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Voxel / Sparse Discretization

taxonomy_nodes.description: Learned place descriptors that fuse LiDAR with image, radar, semantic, or other sensor modalities.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Multimodal

taxonomy_nodes.description: Learned global descriptors whose main encoder operates on points or point neighborhoods.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Raw Point / Point Network

taxonomy_nodes.description: Learned global descriptors based primarily on range, spherical, BEV, or other 2D projections.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Projection

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods whose primary retrieval unit is a local keypoint, patch, neighborhood, or local geometric feature extracted from LiDAR data.
exclude: single descriptor for an entire scan
taxonomy_nodes.name: Local Descriptor

taxonomy_nodes.description: Local descriptors defined by deterministic geometric or signal-processing rules without learned parameters.
exclude: features learned from labelled or self-supervised data
taxonomy_nodes.name: Handcrafted

taxonomy_nodes.description: Handcrafted local descriptors computed from spherical-view, BEV, range-image, or other 2D projections.
taxonomy_nodes.name: 2D Projection Local

taxonomy_nodes.description: Handcrafted local descriptors operating directly on 3D neighborhoods.
taxonomy_nodes.name: 3D Local

taxonomy_nodes.description: Local LiDAR descriptors whose representation or matching function is learned from data.
exclude: global pooling as the primary descriptor
taxonomy_nodes.name: Learning

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods that explicitly match a query scan or submap against a persistent map representation and produce place or global-localization hypotheses.
exclude: map used only as storage for single-scan descriptors
taxonomy_nodes.name: Map

taxonomy_nodes.description: Map-based recognition or global localization using handcrafted map features, grids, meshes, probabilities, or registration rules.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Handcrafted

taxonomy_nodes.description: Map-based recognition or global localization using learned map, node, intensity, point-cloud, or cross-source representations.
exclude: scan-only retrieval with no explicit map representation
taxonomy_nodes.name: Learning

taxonomy_nodes.description: LPR methods centered on a distinct research dimension not adequately represented by the stable categories above.
exclude: method that fits an existing category but uses an unusual backbone
taxonomy_nodes.name: Other Methods

taxonomy_nodes.description: Recognition between substantially different sensing viewpoints, platforms, map sources, or domains.
exclude: ordinary seasonal domain shift within the same sensor setup
taxonomy_nodes.name: Cross-source / Cross-domain

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods whose main contribution is lifelong adaptation, novelty handling, calibrated uncertainty, or memory management for place recognition.
exclude: ordinary retrieval confidence used only as a threshold
taxonomy_nodes.name: Lifelong / Uncertainty

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods that partition a scan or map into object-like or geometric segments and recognize places through segment descriptors or relations.
exclude: global scan descriptor without segment identities
taxonomy_nodes.name: Segments

taxonomy_nodes.description: Segment-based recognition using handcrafted segment descriptors, matching, or structural similarity.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Handcrafted

taxonomy_nodes.description: Segment-based recognition using learned descriptors, classifiers, or similarity models.
exclude: semantic object graph without segment retrieval
taxonomy_nodes.name: Learning

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods where semantic classes, objects, or semantic relations are a primary source of place-recognition evidence.
exclude: semantic labels used only for visualization or filtering
taxonomy_nodes.name: Semantics

taxonomy_nodes.description: Semantic place recognition using graphs of objects, classes, segments, or relations.
exclude: flat semantic histogram without graph relations
taxonomy_nodes.name: Graph-based

taxonomy_nodes.description: Semantic place recognition using semantic descriptors or embeddings without an explicit relational graph.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Graph-free

taxonomy_nodes.description: Methods that use ordered scan sequences, submap trajectories, or odometry-linked temporal context for place recognition.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Trajectory

taxonomy_nodes.description: Trajectory or sequence recognition based on deterministic distance, overlap, registration, or temporal rules.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Handcrafted

taxonomy_nodes.description: Trajectory or sequence recognition using learned temporal, recurrent, or attention-based models.
taxonomy_nodes.name: Learning
